decisions.decision: docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md remains the accepted forward product-maturity roadmap; docs/11 and docs/23 now route forward maturity to R0-R8.
M0-M6 Gate documents and historical outcomes are preserved as historical engineering evidence, not rewritten.
M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 is PARTIAL retained non-active evidence, not operational READY/IN_PROGRESS work.
Created exactly four R0 downstream tasks: repository state reconciliation, production fixture/no-op audit, status ledger compaction, and R0 exit validation. No R1 implementation tasks were created.

Unique active lead remains 019eff50-c69d-7612-a90b-7024a47e0af5. Client thread 019f1f02-6d7b-72a0-86db-8945be6b0606 is recorded as stale/not-found/closed from real close_agent not_found result, with no fabricated close success.
Autonomous Goal Mode remains enabled and human_gate.required remains false.

risks.summary: taskctl ready is intentionally empty until QA/lead accept RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 because downstream RR0 tasks depend on this task.
risks.mitigation: goal/model/thread state records RR0-REPOSITORY-STATE-RECONCILIATION-001 as the next task after acceptance.

risks.summary: Original M7 renderer work remains in D:/WebProjects/MonsoonSovereigns and is not migrated by this task.
risks.mitigation: M7 renderer task records retained evidence paths and routes split/abandon/migrate decision to RR0-REPOSITORY-STATE-RECONCILIATION-001.

risks.summary: PROJECT_STATUS.md still contains long historical M0-M7 ledger content.
risks.mitigation: Top R0 snapshot clarifies current truth; compaction is deliberately deferred to RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001.

tests_run.result: Confirmed worktree root D:/WebProjects/MonsoonSovereigns-rr0-roadmap-adoption. Changed paths are limited to PROJECT_STATUS.md, docs/11-roadmap.md, docs/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix.md, goal/model/thread state, M7 retained-evidence task JSON, four RR0 task JSON files, and this handoff.
Listed tasks successfully. RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 is REVIEW; four downstream RR0 tasks are DRAFT; M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 is PARTIAL.
No output. Expected: downstream RR0 tasks depend on RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 acceptance, and old M7 renderer is no longer READY.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec prettier --check docs/11-roadmap.md docs/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix.md docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md project/tasks/active/RR0-*.json
tests_run.result: All matched files use Prettier code style. Prettier --write was run first on the same allowed file set after the initial check reported formatting issues.

tests_run.command: node -e parse all changed JSON files
tests_run.result: Parsed 9 changed JSON files: goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, M7 renderer task, thread registry, and five RR0 task files.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only check proving no forbidden paths changed
tests_run.result: No forbidden paths changed. Changed paths exclude apps/**, packages/**, tests/**, content-source/**, .github/**, tools/**, dependency manifests, release artifacts, and docs/GATE-M0.md through docs/GATE-M6.md.

tests_run.command: git status --short -- PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/11-roadmap.md docs/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix.md in D:/WebProjects/MonsoonSovereigns
tests_run.result: No output after correction. The accidental original-worktree edits to those three docs were restored; unrelated original M7 worktree changes were not touched.

summary: Adopted docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md as the accepted forward product-maturity roadmap, synchronized docs/11 and docs/23 to R0-R8 while preserving old M0-M8 material as historical ledger, added an R0 current snapshot to PROJECT_STATUS.md, moved M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 to non-active PARTIAL retained-evidence state, created the four-task R0 graph, and updated goal-mode/model-routing/thread registry with the unique active lead and stale not-found client thread evidence.
requested_action: Review RR0 roadmap adoption, R0 task graph, retained M7 evidence status, thread/goal-mode routing, path scope, and validation evidence. Return ACCEPT or REQUEST_CHANGES.
